zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Croft於大約1355年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾道爾頓時，他的父親Sir John Croft20歲，母親Catherine Harroch10歲。他於1392年與Janet Verch Owain Glendower在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1419年在英國英格蘭賀福爾萊奧明斯特享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Croft于大约1355年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾道爾頓时，他的父亲Sir John Croft20岁，母亲Catherine Harroch10岁。他于1392年与Janet Verch Owain Glendower在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1419年在英国英格兰賀福爾萊奧明斯特享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Croft
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, for example in Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Herefordshire, and North Yorkshire, all named with Old English croft ‘small arable enclosure (normally adjoining a house)’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a croft, from Middle English croft.
English: possibly in some cases a variant of   Craft   2.
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . Compare   Kroft   and   Craft  .

variants.name: Craft
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English craft ‘skillful, clever, learned’.
English: habitational name from Croft in Leicestershire. See also   Croft  .
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . See also   Croft  .

variants.name: Crate
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): from Middle English crate ‘hurdle, basket’, or occasionally perhaps from crete ‘cradle’, probably applied as a metonymic occupational name for a maker of such articles. Alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Croft 1.

variants.name: Crofts
meanings: English: variant of Croft , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Groft
meanings: English: perhaps an altered form of   Croft  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Croft was born about 1355, in Dalton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Croft, was 20 and his mother, Catherine Harroch, was 10. He married Janet Verch Owain Glendower in 1392, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1419, in Leominster, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Croft est né environ 1355, à Dalton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Croft, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Catherine Harroch, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Janet Verch Owain Glendower en 1392, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1419, à Leominster, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Croft um 1355 in Dalton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Croft 20 und seine Mutter Catherine Harroch 10. Er hat 1392 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Janet Verch Owain Glendower geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1419 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Leominster, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Croft è nato il circa 1355 nel Dalton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Croft, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Harroch, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Janet Verch Owain Glendower nel 1392, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1419, nel Leominster, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Croftが約1355年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアダルトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Croftは20歳，母Catherine Harrochは10歳であった。1392年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでJanet Verch Owain Glendowerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1419年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアレオミンスターで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Croft(이)가 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 돌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Croft(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Harroch(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Janet Verch Owain Glendower(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리민스터에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Croft nasceu aproximadamente 1355, em Dalton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Croft, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Harroch, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Verch Owain Glendower em 1392, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1419, em Leominster, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Croft родился около 1355 г. в местности далтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Croft было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Harroch, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Verch Owain Glendower в 1392 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1419 г. в местности леоминстир, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Croft nació aproximadamente 1355, en Dalton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Croft, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Catherine Harroch, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Janet Verch Owain Glendower en 1392, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1419, en Leominster, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
